label: AMI BIOS

label: Award BIOS
title: Award BIOS Beep Codes

label: Phoenix BIOS
title: Phoenix BIOS Beep Codes
note: Phoenix uses a pattern of groups separated by pauses (e.g., 1-3-1-1 means 1 beep, pause, 3 beeps, pause, 1 beep, pause, 1 beep). Only the most common codes are listed.

codes.desc: Unconfirmed â€” reseat or replace RAM chips
